what_it_does: Records an image attachment for the design-source channel, referencing a pitch-deck image asset and the time it was added.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
standouts: target points to an image URI inside a pitch-deck
conventions: id prefix att- for attachment records
image:// URI scheme for asset target
concerns: no caption, title, or description for the image
target URI cannot be verified from this file alone
notes: A bare attachment ledger entry that links a design-source channel image attachment to pitch-deck image p-02 and records when it was added.
questions: What does pitch-deck image p-02 depict?
Who added this attachment and why?
Is the target image actually present in the referenced location?
How does this attachment relate to other attachments in the same channel?
purpose_vs_actual: matches — the file is an attachment metadata record as the path and content indicate.
intention_signals: To create a lightweight, timestamped binding between a channel and a specific image asset in a pitch deck.
novelty: use of an image:// URI scheme to name the attachment target rather than a filesystem path.
contribution: Provides a concrete, timestamped attachment binding (id, channel, type, target) that a fused system would keep as a provenance record for the pitch-deck image in the design-source channel.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata record att-e197214d in the design-source channel linking to image asset image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-02 with an addition timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record when an image from the pitch deck was attached to the design-source channel.
